subject: Droppbox Notification
preview: Dropbox Security Notification

body.text: Our security system has detected some irregular activity connected to your account. You will be unable to open documents until this issue has been resolved.
CLICK HERE TO RESET YOUR PASSWORD

subject: important! Company Evaluation!
preview: Please fill out this company evaluation

body.text: we urge you to complete the following company evaluation within 24 hours of receipt so that we can have enough time to evaluate it. We remind yout that filling out is mandatory to every employee.

subject: Quick Empliyee Survey
preview: Quick Employee Survey

body.text:
We are conducting an employee survey this year to improve the climate withing our team.
You have a maximum of 24 hours to complete the questionnaire.
The questionnaire is mandatory for every employee.
If you do not complete the questionnaire within the time limit, we will notify your boss.
CLICK HERE TO ACCESS THE SURVEY

Thank you in advance!

Your Global Connect Team

subject: RE: Document meeting urgent!
preview: below is the link...

body.text:
Hey,
below is the link to the important document for the next meeting. Please have a look if everything is correct.
Open this recourse to preview the document (it the link doesn't work, copy it and past to browser):

subject: Earn extra money
preview: Great things are planned for this year's foundation anniversary...

body.text: Great things are planned for this year's foundation anniversary. For this reason, we still need helpers who actively support us in the construction. To make the offer a little more attractive, we have talked with the company management and decided that each helper receives a bonus. For every hour worked you will get 50 Euro extra! To participate, you have to register today at the following link (all information is summarized there as well):
!! Important: Tomorrow we will not accept any more registrations.

subject: UPDATE OneDrive: Validate your Account
preview: Security Notice!

body.text: Dear John Doe, our security system has detected some irregular activity connected to your account. You will be unable to share documents until this issue has been resolved.

subject: Win a new IPhone
preview: Global Connect raffles 10 new iphones as corporate phones.

body.text: because the turnover was very high last year, Global Connect raffles 10 new iphones as corporate phones among all employees. This is our way to thank employees! If you want to participate in raffle, please register under the link following:

subject: New Corona regulations
preview: New regulations in the sense of the infection protection.

body.text: The government has decided, due to the again rising Corona numbers, new regulations in the sense of the infection protection. These will be valid from tomorrow and sanctioned with high fines in case of violation. All necessary information can be found in the following link:

subject: Extend your Microsoft license
preview: We would like remind you to renew your anual Microsoft license.

body.text: We would like remind you to renew your anual Microsoft license in order to continue Microsoft services and applications using. Otherwise we will be forced to block your acount.

subject: Max Miller has shared Meeting Guide with you
preview: Max Miller has invited you to edit the document Meeting guide.

body.text: Max Miller (maxmiller@globalconnect.com) has invited you to edit the document "Meeting guide" in Dropbox.

subject: Lunchbreak?
preview: You want to have lunch today?

body.text: You want to have lunch today? I heard about a new restaurant right around the corner. We could go

subject: Distribution FFP2 Masks
preview: Two FFP2 masks will be distributed to all employees next Monday.

body.text: since we at Global-Connect have a FFP2 mask obligation in our office from the week after next, two FFP2 masks will be distributed to all employees next Monday.
You can pick up the masks from 09:00 am in the manager room.
Thank you and stay safe, sane and healthy!

subject: Explanation Transponder battery replacement
preview: There are still questions regarding the battery change of the transponders.

body.text: Since there are still some questions regarding the battery change of the transponders, we have made the effort to create an online overview. You can find this overview on our homepage under the following link:

subject: Company party
preview: We are very pleased to invite you to our company party.

body.text: one year is over again and we are very pleased to invite you to our company party. The party will take place as usual in our regular restaurant. So that we can reserve enough places, we ask you to register bindingly under the following link:
We are looking forward to seeing you!

subject: Information mail - Craftsman
preview: I have ordered a craftsman for next Monday.

body.text: I have ordered a craftsman for next Monday between 10am and 12pm to have someone take a look at the sink in the kitchen. Will you please take him in as I will be in a meeting during that time?

subject: Numbers Document
preview: maxmiller@globalconnect.com shared the following Document with you.

body.text: maxmiller@globalconnect.com shared the following Document with you:
Google Docs: Create and edit documents online
Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

subject: New break room regulations
preview: We have changed our rules for the break room.

body.text: due to the current situation, we have changed our rules for the break room. The implementation is strictly controlled and violations are noted in the personnel file. So that this does not have to happen, you can find everything at a glance under the following link:

subject: New break room regulations
preview: The disinfection dispenser on the second floor is broken.

body.text: we have received feedback that the disinfection dispenser on the second floor is broken. We will take care of the problem as soon as possible. Until then we will provide you with another disinfection dispenser on the other side of the hallway.

subject: Deadline Project
preview: Please send me all necessary documents by mail until then.

body.text: after consultation with our customer, I set the deadline for the current project to 15.03.2021. Please send me all necessary documents by mail until then.

Thank you!
Best regards
Timo Michaelsen

subject: Urgent! Missing Documents
preview: I am still missing the documents from our last team meeting.

body.text: Unfortunately, I am still missing the documents from our last team meeting. Could you please put all the files in my box today? I need them urgently!

subject: Appointment Paulsen
preview: Could you please make an appointment with our customer Mr. Paulsen?

body.text: could you please make an appointment with our customer Mr. Paulsen for next week as soon as possible? Then we can clarify everything else.

subject: Submission of sick leave
preview: We still need your sick leave for our booking office.

body.text: We still need your sick leave for our booking office. Since time is now short, it would be great if you send it directly by post.

subject: Submit vacation request
preview: You are welcome to take a vacation at the requested time.

body.text: We have revised our planning and decided that you are welcome to take a vacation at the requested time. In order for everything to work out, you should send us your application as soon as possible.

subject: Feedback request
preview: Could you please look over it and help me?

body.text: thanks for your help with my project! I have tried to implement everything, but I am stuck at another point... Could you please look over it and help me? That would be very important to me, because my deadline is tomorrow.

subject: Task
preview: I am totally stressed and urgently need your support with a task.

body.text: Unfortunately, I am totally stressed and urgently need your support with a task. Please come by my office in 30 minutes, then you will receive all the important information.

subject: Missing information
preview: We are currently drafting the new contract as discussed.

body.text: we are currently drafting the new contract as discussed. However, we are still missing some information, which is why we cannot finalize it. Could you please send the persons concerned to our office?

subject: Schedule zoom meeting for employee review
preview: Our monthly employee review meeting is coming up again.

body.text: our monthly employee review meeting is coming up again. Could you please schedule a Zoom meeting for all employees in the department?

subject: Mieter vs. Vermieter – Wo wird am meisten gestritten?
preview: Ausgeschlossen? So kommen Sie ohne Schlüsseldienst rein

body.text: Der Marktführer: Die Nr. 1 rund um Immobilien
Ausgeschlossen? So kommen Sie ohne Schlüsseldienst rein

Einmal nicht aufgepasst und plötzlich steht man vor der eigenen Haustür – und der Schlüssel liegt drinnen. Schlüsselnotdienste verlangen saftige Preise für Einsätze an Wochenenden oder in der Nacht. Welche Alternativen gibt es?
